body_preview: - Day 117 assessment: 6 of last 10 sessions landed zero code. The harness doesn't track or respond to streaks of no-op sessions. - YOUR TRAJECTORY graph pressure: `session_success_rate=0.0`, `planner_no_task_count=1` — the trajectory knows individual sessions fail but has no streak-aware diagnostic. - Journal entries from Day 115–117 explicitly name the "hea
expected_evidence: Future YOUR TRAJECTORY blocks show a "Consecutive empty sessions" metric The planning phase receives streak pressure, enabling strategy changes after repeated no-ops The `evo_readiness` `classification` field surfaces streak information Implementation Notes: Keep the change bounded: add a helper function that iterates session outcomes and counts consecutive
title: Track consecutive-empty-session streaks in trajectory extractor
